# Generated by Jekyll

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /assets/images/
Allow: /assets/css/
Allow: /assets/js/

# Block folder internal
Disallow: /_drafts/
Disallow: /_includes/
Disallow: /_layouts/
Disallow: /_sass/
Disallow: /_data/

# Block file sensitif
Disallow: /Gemfile
Disallow: /Gemfile.lock
Disallow: /README.md

# Sitemap
Sitemap: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/sitemap.xml

# Crawl delay (opsional, untuk mengurangi load server)
# Crawl-delay: 1
